hierarchy_levels.name: Phonology/Graphology
hierarchy_levels.description: The smallest distinctive units of sound or writing.

hierarchy_levels.name: Morphology
hierarchy_levels.description: Smallest units of meaning (e.g., roots, prefixes, suffixes).

hierarchy_levels.name: Lexical
hierarchy_levels.description: Individual vocabulary items and their parts of speech (POS).

hierarchy_levels.name: Syntax
hierarchy_levels.description: The structural rules governing how words combine into grammatical sequences.

hierarchy_levels.name: Semantics
hierarchy_levels.description: The literal meaning of the constructed sequences.

hierarchy_levels.name: Pragmatics
hierarchy_levels.description: How context and intent affect the interpretation of meaning.

hierarchy_levels.name: Discourse
hierarchy_levels.description: The largest unit, looking at how sentences relate to one another over a duration.
